basic_details.job_title: JSSC – Assistant, Inspector and More – 611 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC), Kalinagar, Chayabagan, Namkum, Ranchi-834010
basic_details.short_information: Jharkhand JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 611 vacancies across Jharkhand. Eligible candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc, B.Pharma, M.Pharma can apply online from 01-06-2026 to 30-06-2026 through the official JSSC website, jssc.jharkhand.gov.in

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) - Preliminary Exam + Main Exam (Two stages)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted through online mode at https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/ only. No hard copy of the application or documents should be sent to the JSSC office. Candidates should not wait until the last date and must submit applications well in advance.
seo_tags: Jharkhand JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 611 Assistant, Inspector and More Posts
